churchTestimonials.quote: Proclaim Canada helped us find the perfect guest preacher within days. The quality of candidates and ease of use exceeded our expectations!
We've used several platforms to find pulpit supply, but Proclaim Canada has by far the best selection of qualified preachers. Highly recommend!
The messaging system made communication so easy. We found a Spirit-filled speaker for our revival who delivered beyond what we hoped for.
As a large church with multiple campuses, we need reliable pulpit supply regularly. Proclaim Canada has become our go-to platform.
Finding bilingual preachers who understand Reformed theology is challenging. Proclaim Canada made it possible!
We hosted a men's conference and found our keynote speaker through Proclaim Canada. The process was seamless and the speaker was outstanding!

pastorTestimonials.name: Rev. Dr. James Wilson
pastorTestimonials.quote: Proclaim Canada connected me with churches I never would have found on my own. I've had 15 speaking engagements in the past year!

pastorTestimonials.name: Pastor Maria Santos
pastorTestimonials.quote: The platform is so easy to use. I can browse opportunities, apply with one click, and track everything in one place.

pastorTestimonials.name: Rev. Daniel Park
pastorTestimonials.quote: I was skeptical at first, but Proclaim Canada has been a blessing. The matching system connected me with churches that align with my theology.

pastorTestimonials.name: Bishop Angela Thompson
pastorTestimonials.quote: Retirement didn't mean the end of ministry. Proclaim Canada helps me stay active, preaching 2-3 times a month.

pastorTestimonials.name: Pastor Emmanuel Okonkwo
pastorTestimonials.quote: As a new pastor in Canada, this platform helped me build connections and gain valuable preaching experience.

pastorTestimonials.name: Rev. Jessica Anderson
pastorTestimonials.quote: The best part about Proclaim Canada is the direct messaging with churches. I can ask questions and get a feel for the congregation before applying.
